Digital Intelligence

REVENUE PROTECTION PROTOCOL • LAST UPDATED: JAN 28, 2026

  • The Protocol
  • Intelligence
  • Deployment
  • Security
  • Human Comms

01. Radical Transparency

At OutAfBox, we treat your brand's data with the same engineering rigor we apply to our conversion funnels. This isn't just a legal requirement; it's a commitment to Radical Transparency.

Most agencies hide behind vague terms. We do the opposite. Below is the exact breakdown of how we handle your digital footprint to maximize your growth while protecting your IP.

02. Intelligence Gathering

We only collect data that directly contributes to revenue growth or site performance. No fluff. No waste.

  • » Strategic Intent Data: Name, professional email, and store metrics shared during your Growth Audit application.
  • » Performance Metrics: Spend ranges, current ROAS targets, and funnel URLs required for our diagnostic engineering.
  • » Technical Footprint: Interaction data, browser telemetry, and attribution pings captured to optimize your experience.

03. Deployment

Your data has one job: scale. We deploy this intelligence to:

  • Engineer custom growth projections and revenue models.
  • Filter for high-intent brand partnerships (we don't work with everyone).
  • Refine our internal Ecosystem performance benchmarks.

04. Zero Leakage Policy

We don't rent, sell, or trade your intelligence. Period.

SECURITY STATUS: ENCRYPTED • ACCESS: RESTRICTED TO LEAD STRATEGISTS

Data Inquiry?

If you need to audit the information we have on file for your brand, contact our Intelligence Ops team directly:

info@outafbox.com →
Final Step to Scale

Ready to stop renting agencies?

Partner with an ecosystem that incentives your growth. We only win when you scale.
